Accordion is used for showing and hiding: Accordion is used for showing and hiding content but only one item can stay open at a time.
Alert informs users about important even: Alert informs users about important events.
Avatars are used to show a thumbnail rep: Avatars are used to show a thumbnail representation of an individual or business in the interface.
Badges are used to inform the user of th: Badges are used to inform the user of the status of specific data.
Breadcrumbs helps users to navigate thro: Breadcrumbs helps users to navigate through the website.
Buttons allow the user to take actions o: Buttons allow the user to take actions or make choices.
Cards are used to group and display cont: Cards are used to group and display content in a way that is easily readable.
Carousel show images or content in a scr: Carousel show images or content in a scrollable area.
Chat bubbles are used to show one line o: Chat bubbles are used to show one line of conversation and all its data, including the author image, author name, time, etc.
Checkboxes are used to select or deselec: Checkboxes are used to select or deselect a value.
Collapse is used for showing and hiding: Collapse is used for showing and hiding content.
Diff component shows a side-by-side comp: Diff component shows a side-by-side comparison of two items.
Divider will be used to separate content: Divider will be used to separate content vertically or horizontally.
Drawer is a grid layout that can show/hi: Drawer is a grid layout that can show/hide a sidebar on the left or right side of the page.
Dropdown can open a menu or any other el: Dropdown can open a menu or any other element when the button is clicked.
File Input is a an input field for uploa: File Input is a an input field for uploading files.
Footer can contain logo, copyright notic: Footer can contain logo, copyright notice, and links to other pages.
Hero is a component for displaying a lar: Hero is a component for displaying a large box or image with a title and description.
Indicators are used to place an element: Indicators are used to place an element on the corner of another element.
Text Input is a simple input field.
Kbd is used to display keyboard shortcut: Kbd is used to display keyboard shortcuts.
Link adds the missing underline style to: Link adds the missing underline style to links.
Loading shows an animation to indicate t: Loading shows an animation to indicate that something is loading.
Mask crops the content of the element to: Mask crops the content of the element to common shapes.
Menu is used to display a list of links: Menu is used to display a list of links vertically or horizontally.
Browser mockup shows a box that looks li: Browser mockup shows a box that looks like a browser window.
Code mockup is used to show a block of c: Code mockup is used to show a block of code in a box that looks like a code editor.
Phone mockup shows a mockup of an iPhone: Phone mockup shows a mockup of an iPhone.
Window mockup shows a box that looks lik: Window mockup shows a box that looks like an operating system window.
Modal is used to show a dialog or a box: Modal is used to show a dialog or a box when you click a button.
Navbar is used to show a navigation bar: Navbar is used to show a navigation bar on the top of the page.
Pagination is a group of buttons that al: Pagination is a group of buttons that allow the user to navigate between a set of related content.
Progress bar can be used to show the pro: Progress bar can be used to show the progress of a task or to show the passing of time.
Radial progress can be used to show the: Radial progress can be used to show the progress of a task or to show the passing of time.
Radio buttons allow the user to select o: Radio buttons allow the user to select one option from a set.
Range slider is used to select a value b: Range slider is used to select a value by sliding a handle.
Rating is a set of radio buttons that al: Rating is a set of radio buttons that allow the user to rate something.
Select is used to pick a value from a li: Select is used to pick a value from a list of options.
Skeleton is a component that can be used: Skeleton is a component that can be used to show a loading state of a component.
Stack visually puts elements on top of e: Stack visually puts elements on top of each other.
Steps can be used to show a list of step: Steps can be used to show a list of steps in a process.
Swap allows you to toggle the visibility: Swap allows you to toggle the visibility of two elements using a checkbox or a class name.
Tabs can be used to show a list of links: Tabs can be used to show a list of links in a tabbed format.
Table can be used to show a list of data: Table can be used to show a list of data in a table format.
Textarea allows users to enter text in m: Textarea allows users to enter text in multiple lines.
If a checked checkbox input or a checked: If a checked checkbox input or a checked radio input with theme-controller class exists in the page, The page will have the same theme as that input's value.
Timeline component shows a list of event: Timeline component shows a list of events in chronological order.
Toast is a wrapper to stack elements, po: Toast is a wrapper to stack elements, positioned on the corner of page.
Toggle is a checkbox that is styled to l: Toggle is a checkbox that is styled to look like a switch button.
Tooltip can be used to show a message wh: Tooltip can be used to show a message when hovering over an element.
To use a custom prefix, <a class='link': To use a custom prefix, add your prefix string to config
This button will have different sizes on: This button will have different sizes on different browser viewpoints
If you set max-width or the list gets la: If you set max-width or the list gets larger than the container it will scroll
to join the items together and handle bo: to join the items together and handle border radius automatically
This collapse works with focus. When div: This collapse works with focus. When div loses focus, it gets closed
This collapse works with checkbox instea: This collapse works with checkbox instead of focus. It needs to get clicked again to get closed.
Use Tailwind CSS `group` and `group-focu: Use Tailwind CSS `group` and `group-focus` utilities to apply style when parent div is focused
Use Tailwind CSS `peer` and `peer-checke: Use Tailwind CSS `peer` and `peer-checked` utilities to apply style when sibling checkbox is checked
opens on click using ID.showModal() meth: opens on click using ID.showModal() method. can be closed using ID.close() method
there is a second form with 'modal-backd: there is a second form with 'modal-backdrop' class and it covers the screen so we can close the modal when clicked outside
You can use any w-* and max-w-* utility: You can use any w-* and max-w-* utility class to customize the width
Modal works with a hidden checkbox and l: Modal works with a hidden checkbox and labels can toggle the checkbox so we can use another label tag with 'modal-backdrop' class that covers the screen so we can close the modal when clicked outside
Dialog modal with a close button at corn: Dialog modal with a close button at corner
Instead of working with click, it shows: Instead of working with click, it shows swap-on item if you add swap-active class name. You can add or remove swap-active class using JS

The content gets displayed when the butt: The content gets displayed when the button is focused.
Change screen size to show/hide menu: Change screen size to show/hide menu
Sidebar is always visible on large scree: Sidebar is always visible on large screen, can be toggled on small screen because of lg:drawer-open class
is a hidden radio at the start to allow: is a hidden radio at the start to allow users to remove their rating.
Example using daisyUI styles and daisyUI: Example using daisyUI styles and daisyUI dropdown
writing an invalid email address applies: writing an invalid email address applies error color to the input. Valid email address applies success color.
If value is invalid, a hint text appears: If value is invalid, a hint text appears below the input.
Click the button before picking an optio: Click the button before picking an option to see the error color.
Even if join-item is not a direct child: Even if join-item is not a direct child of the group, it still gets the style
We can use input class for the parent an: We can use input class for the parent and put anything inside it
collapse-open and collapse-close doesn't: collapse-open and collapse-close doesn't work with this method. You can add/remove open attribute to the details instead
This slider works with anchor links so t: This slider works with anchor links so the browser will snap vertically to the image when you click buttons.
Use toggle class for a label, put a chec: Use toggle class for a label, put a checkbox and 2 icons inside it.
square aspect ratio or with rounded corn: square aspect ratio or with rounded corners
you can open/close the submenu by adding: you can open/close the submenu by adding/removing menu-dropdown-show class using JS
A HTML from for filtering items: A HTML from for filtering items
Use this if you can't use a HTML form fo: Use this if you can't use a HTML form for some reason
Modal goes bottom on SM screen size, goe: Modal goes bottom on SM screen size, goes middle on MD screen size
A hidden checkbox can control the state: A hidden checkbox can control the state of modal and labels can toggle the checkbox so we can open/close the modal.
is required for responsivness of the doc: is required for responsivness of the dock in iOS.
details and summary are native HTML elem: details and summary are native HTML elements that can be used to create dropdowns.
Dropdown using details and summary opens: Dropdown using details and summary opens and closes the content when the summary is clicked. You can also open/close it using JS by adding/removing the `open` attribute
Popover API is the new HTML standard for: Popover API is the new HTML standard for creating dropdowns. It opens the dropdown on a top layer, which means there's no need to z-index management and there's no overflow issue.
Anchor positioning is a new CSS standard: Anchor positioning is a new CSS standard for positioning elements relative to an anchor.
`popovertarget` is the unique ID of the: `popovertarget` is the unique ID of the popover content.
`anchor-name`/`position-anchor` is the u: `anchor-name`/`position-anchor` is the unique name of the anchor.
Safari has a [CSS bug](https://bugs.webk: Safari has a [CSS bug](https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=22261) since 2008 that prevents button elements from being focused, so we use div `tabindex="0"` as a workaround.
This approach is accessible with the add: This approach is accessible with the addition of `role="button"` and functions consistently across all browsers.
A normal text and a helper dropdown: A normal text and a helper dropdown
Drawer is a grid layout that can show/hi: Drawer is a grid layout that can show/hide a sidebar on the left or right side of the page, based on the screen size or based on the value of a `drawer-toggle` checkbox.
Drawer must be the parent element of the: Drawer must be the parent element of the content and sidebar.
Drawer sidebar is hidden by default.
You can make it visible on larger screen: You can make it visible on larger screens using `lg:drawer-open` class (or using other responsive prefixes: sm, md, lg, xl)
You can check/uncheck the checkbox using: You can check/uncheck the checkbox using JavaScript or by clicking the `label` tag which is assigned to the hidden checkbox
Opening a drawer adds a [scrollbar-gutte: Opening a drawer adds a [scrollbar-gutter](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/scrollbar-gutter) to the page to avoid layout shift on operating systems that have a fixed scrollbar.
If you don't want to use this feature, [: If you don't want to use this feature, [you can exclude `rootscrollgutter`](/docs/config/#exclude).
For pagination, we use [join component](: For pagination, we use [join component](/components/join/) to show multiple links or buttons next to each other.
Items in each rating should have unique: Items in each rating should have unique `name` attributes to avoid conflicts with other ratings on the same page.
daisyUI includes styles for 3 popular ca: daisyUI includes styles for 3 popular calendar libraries.
Use any of them, based on your needs.
You don't need to import the CSS files f: You don't need to import the CSS files for these libraries. daisyUI will style them automatically.
Cally is a web component calendar and it: Cally is a web component calendar and it works everywhere. [Read the docs](https://github.com/WickyNilliams/cally)
React Day Picker is a flexible date pick: React Day Picker is a flexible date picker component for React. [Read the docs](https://github.com/gpbl/react-day-picker)
Each set of radio inputs should have uni: Each set of radio inputs should have unique `name` attributes to avoid conflicts with other sets of radio inputs on the same page.
`validator-hint` class will be invisible: `validator-hint` class will be invisible if it comes after a `validator` class, then if the input is invalid, `validator-hint` will get visible.
`validator-hint` still occupies space ev: `validator-hint` still occupies space even if it's invisible because we don't want a layout shift when the hint appears.
If you prefer to hide the hint when it's: If you prefer to hide the hint when it's not visible, add `hidden` class to `validator-hint`. It will take no space when it's hidden, and if input is invalid, it will appear and take space.
`input` class can be used for any input: `input` class can be used for any input field type. Including `text`, `password`, `email`, `number`, `date`, `datetime-local`, `week`, `month`, `tel`, `url`, `search`, `time`
For `checkbox`, `radio`, `file`, `range`: For `checkbox`, `radio`, `file`, `range` use their own class names, as they are not visually input fields.
Inputs can be used with `validator` clas: Inputs can be used with `validator` class to have validation styles. [See Validator component](/components/validator/) for more details.
we use cookies for no reason.
Add \"link\" class to make it look like: Add "link" class to make it look like a
Radial progress needs `--value` CSS vari: Radial progress needs `--value` CSS variable to work.
To change the size, use `--size` CSS var: To change the size, use `--size` CSS variable which has a default value of `5rem`.
To change the thickness, use `--thicknes: To change the thickness, use `--thickness` CSS variable which is 10% of the size by default.
For Radial progress we need to use a `di: For Radial progress we need to use a `div` instead of the `progress` tag because browsers can't show text inside `progress` tag, and Firefox doesn’t render pseudo-elements inside `progress` tag at all.
Adding `role=\"progressbar\"` makes it a: Adding `role="progressbar"` makes it accessible to screen readers as well.
By default, the second child of the `lis: By default, the second child of the `list-row` will fill the remaining space. You can use `list-col-grow` on another child to make it fill the remaining space instead.

Theme Controller changes the theme using: Theme Controller changes the theme using CSS only.
You can then use JS to save the input st: You can then use JS to save the input state in the server or localStorage if you want it to persist on page refresh.

You can use `w-*` and `h-*` classes to s: You can use `w-*` and `h-*` classes to set the width and height of the stack, making all items the same size.
A link adds a parameter to the URL and y: A link adds a parameter to the URL and you only see the modal when the URL has that parameter
Opening a modal adds a [scrollbar-gutter: Opening a modal adds a [scrollbar-gutter](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/scrollbar-gutter) to the page to avoid layout shift on operating systems that have a fixed scrollbar.
HTML dialog element is a native way to c: HTML dialog element is a native way to create modals. It is accessible and we can close the modal using `Esc` key.
We can open the modal using JS `ID.showM: We can open the modal using JS `ID.showModal()` method and close it using `ID.close()` method.
The ID must be unique for each modal.
When modal is closed, the page will scro: When modal is closed, the page will scroll to the top because of the anchor link.
Anchor links might not work well on some: Anchor links might not work well on some SPA frameworks. If there are problems, use the other methods
The `hr` tag at the beginning or end of: The `hr` tag at the beginning or end of each item, displays a line to connect items.
`<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"viewp: `<meta name="viewport" content="viewport-fit=cover">` is required for responsivness of the dock in iOS.
`hover-3d` works by placing 8 hover zone: `hover-3d` works by placing 8 hover zones on top of the content. Each zone detects mouse movement and applies a slight rotation to the content based on the mouse position within that zone. The combined effect of all 8 zones creates a smooth and responsive 3D tilt effect as the user moves their mouse over the component.
`rating-hidden` is a hidden radio at the: `rating-hidden` is a hidden radio at the start to allow users to remove their rating.
`validator-hint` will be visible if any: `validator-hint` will be visible if any previous (sibling) invalid `validator` element is present - wrap the elements (eg. in `fieldset`) to only show the hint for one invalid input.
A button opens the megamenu and `max-sm:: A button opens the megamenu and `max-sm:megamenu-vertical` class name to make the megamenu vertical on small screens.
Add proper id and for attributes for acc: Add proper id and for attributes for accessibility. The id must be unique and depends on your context.
All radio inputs with the same name work: All radio inputs with the same name work together and only one of them can be open at a time. If you have more than one set of accordion items on a page, use different names for the radio inputs or details elements on each set.
An alternative where you can also click: An alternative where you can also click outside to close it.

Big font size, horizontally centered, 6: Big font size, horizontally centered, 6 seconds duration instead of 10 seconds
Click or focus the A button in the corne: Click or focus the A button in the corner
Dropdown using details and summary opens: Dropdown using details and summary opens and closes the content when the summary is clicked.
Each button must have a corresponding po: Each button must have a corresponding popover with the same id as the popovertarget value. HTML IDs must be unique.
fab-flower modifier class will open the: fab-flower modifier class will open the button in a quarter circle instead of a vertical. The fab-main-action / fab-close button is optional in fab-flower; without it, the first action button also fans out into the arc. fab-flower fits up to 4 action buttons (not including the original button), with or without a fab-main-action / fab-close button.

In this example instead of completely hi: In this example instead of completely hiding the drawer sidebar, we only show the icons when the drawer is closed. To add styles based on the state of the drawer, we use the `is-drawer-open` and `is-drawer-close` variants. For example `is-drawer-close:hidden` or `is-drawer-open:w-80`. Also we have tooltips when the drawer is closed and a switch button to open/close the drawer and rotates the button icon based on the state of the drawer.
It is accessible and we can close the mo: It is accessible and we can close the modal using `Esc` key.
It opens the dropdown on a top layer, wh: It opens the dropdown on a top layer, which means there's no need to z-index management and there's no overflow issue.
It will take no space when it's hidden,: It will take no space when it's hidden, and if input is invalid, it will appear and take space.
Make sure the number of spans matches th: Make sure the number of spans matches the maxlength and the pattern of the input field. In this example, we have 4 spans for a 4-digit OTP.
Megamenu is a big menu with a lot of ite: Megamenu is a big menu with a lot of items but it must be responsive and work on all screen sizes.

On Firefox you need to detect the presen: On Firefox you need to detect the presence of vertical scrollbar and set the `scrollbar-gutter: stable` or `scrollbar-gutter: unset` on `:root` element yourself.
On larger screens, we hide the button an: On larger screens, we hide the button and show the megamenu as a horizontal menu, and each button inside the megamenu will open its corresponding popover.
On recent Chromium based browsers vertic: On recent Chromium based browsers vertical scrollbar presence is detected automatically.
On Safari and on mobile devices the scro: On Safari and on mobile devices the scrollbar is displayed as overlay so there will not be gutter.
On small screens the whole megamenu must: On small screens the whole megamenu must be hidden by default and it must be vertical when visible.
Only use non-interactive content inside: Only use non-interactive content inside the `hover-3d` wrapper. If you want to make the entire card clickable, use a link for the whole `hover-3d` component instead of putting interactive elements like buttons or links inside it.

Hover 3D is a wrapper component that add: Hover 3D is a wrapper component that adds a 3D hover effect to its content. When we hover over the component, it tilts and rotates based on the mouse position, creating an interactive 3D effect.
Hover Gallery is container of images. Th: Hover Gallery is container of images. The first image is visible be default and when we hover it horizontally, other images show up. Hover Gallery is useful for product cards in ecommerce sites, portfoilios or in image galleries. Hover Gallery can include up to 10 images.

Join is a container for grouping multipl: Join is a container for grouping multiple items, it can be used to group buttons, inputs, etc. Join applies border radius to the first and last item. Join can be used to create a horizontal or vertical list of items.
Item inside join. Can be a button, input: Item inside join. Can be a button, input, etc.

Label is used to provide a name or title: Label is used to provide a name or title for an input field. Label can be placed before or after the field.

A megamenu is a large, horizontal menu w: A megamenu is a large, horizontal menu where each item opens a popover to show a large block of navigation links. Megamenu must be used once, on top of the page. Inside each popover, you can use a daisyUI menu, or any custom content. Megamenu fits better on large screens only, and for small screens, you can hide the megamenu and show the content in a dropdown or a drawer.
megamenu dropdown will be as wide as the: megamenu dropdown will be as wide as the megamenu container
megamenu dropdown will fill the entire w: megamenu dropdown will fill the entire width of the page
